title: ASR Outdoor - Wrist Brace Slingshot with Adjustable Iron Frame - Ammo Included
description:

ASR Outdoor - Wrist Brace Slingshot with Adjustable Iron Frame - Ammo Included

This slingshot has an adjustable iron frame and a 7.5" Surgical Grade Rubber Band. The leather pad is great for an easy launch. The rubber wrist support helps to prevent your wrist from getting in the way. The finger grooved grip makes it easier to gain a good grip on the slingshot.

Key Features

  • IRON FRAME - Having an iron frame helps keep the shot sturdy and makes it less likely to break
  • ELASTIC BAND - 7.5" Surgical Grade Rubber
  • SPECIAL FEATURES - Adjustable frame, Leather Pad, Rubber Wrist Support, Base Plates, Lock Nut, and Finger Grooved Grip
  • MANY USES - This a great product to take with you camping, to the park, on a hike,

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 2AIFWS
  • UPC: 060886931065
  • Color: Orange
  • Size: One Size
